note: Shared golden vector for the OpenComputer bundle fileset digest (flue-slice.md contract 4). computeFilesetDigest(files) MUST equal `digest` in all three implementations: cmd/oc filesetdigest (Go), sessions-api skill-bundle-canonical.ts, oc-runtimes adapter-core skills.ts. `mode` is decimal (0o644=420, 0o755=493); `content` is base64 UTF-8. `canonicalTarGzBase64` is a reference-produced canonical tar.gz — gzip framing is implementation-specific and NOT a byte-level golden; use it only to verify parseTar(gunzip(x)) recomputes `digest`.
